name: Automatic Detection of Off-Topic Spoken Responses Using Very Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
summary: Conference paper on detecting off-topic spoken responses in a large-scale high-stakes English speaking assessment. The study uses operational spoken responses and creates synthetic off-topic examples by mismatching responses from other prompts, so it is adjacent evidence for validity-protection stress testing rather than generated-response scoring validation.

access_attempts.notes: ISCA metadata, abstract, DOI, and PDF link verified.
PDF downloaded and text extracted locally.
